text: Return an exact snapshot-bound Budget Position by composing one explicit plan revision, defaulting to Active, with public LEDGER actuals. Evidence [analogous]: LEDGER G6 and UC-LEDGER-005 explicitly define snapshot-consistent Budget Actuals for BUDGET and INSIGHTS. Actor/workflow trace: P1 through UC-BUDGET-003. Requirement trace: FR-BUDGET-LEDGER-COMPOSITION and FR-BUDGET-POSITION-QUERY.
target: Every relevant actual is accounted for exactly once as budgeted, zero-budget, unbudgeted, or uncategorized; category and total actuals reconcile to the referenced LEDGER snapshot, and remaining or over values use exact arithmetic.
